visual_description: Three men stand in a dimly lit, green-tinted outdoor area with metal grates behind them; the central man wears a light suit and looks forward, while the man to his right holds a white object and turns his head slightly. The man on the left, in a dark jacket, stands behind and slightly to the side, observing. The man on the right gestures with his hand toward the central man as he turns his head.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pace and pitch, accompanied by background music and occasional sound effects.
